tasks.title: Trial launch engineering gates and auth readiness evidence
acceptance: Records current evidence for pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, and first-release readiness gates.
Records auth mock-disabled evidence without changing auth runtime code or production configuration.
Updates release readiness report with Pass, Fail, Blocked, or Not verified status for each gate.
Documents skipped checks with reason and required human approval when applicable.
Does not modify business code, migration, seed, auth runtime, CI, Docker, deploy, or production config.

tasks.title: Trial launch leasing finance idempotency and audit evidence
acceptance: Runs or documents safe execution of contract, receivable, payment, invoice, waiver, idempotency, and audit checks.
Produces finance readiness evidence that maps each result to the production readiness matrix.
Documents any write-path data marker and cleanup approach before running local or pre-production smoke.
If a business behavior gap is found, reports it as a follow-up task instead of changing service code.
Does not modify business service, controller, DTO, entity, migration, seed, auth, CI, Docker, or deploy files.

tasks.title: Trial launch safety IoT alert visibility and energy evidence
acceptance: Runs or documents safe execution of S5 safety and S9 IoT / energy smoke coverage.
Records evidence for unified action executor, automatic hazard visibility, alert visibility, duplicate-prevention behavior, and energy billing reversal.
Documents write-path data safety and cleanup approach before running local or pre-production smoke.
If business behavior fails, reports the failing assertion and proposed follow-up instead of modifying service code.
Does not modify business service, controller, DTO, entity, migration, seed, auth, CI, Docker, deploy, or UI files.

tasks.title: Trial launch RBAC menu and dashboard visibility evidence
acceptance: Runs or documents RBAC, role-permission, first-release menu whitelist, and dashboard visibility checks.
Maps each RBAC/menu result to the production readiness matrix and identifies any No-Go blocker.
Documents any production-only manual sampling that still requires human approval.
If a menu or permission implementation gap is found, reports a follow-up task instead of changing app code.
Does not modify apps/api, apps/web, packages, migration, seed, auth, CI, Docker, or deploy files.

tasks.title: Trial launch release smoke rollback file and backup evidence
acceptance: Creates release-chain evidence for migration command shape, production seed approval, init baseline, bootstrap-admin, prod health, and container login verification.
Records file upload/download readiness and file backup evidence requirements without touching production data by default.
Records rollback owner, previous image tag evidence requirement, database backup evidence requirement, observation window, and Docker cleanup evidence requirement.
Clearly marks commands that require human approval before execution.
Does not run deploy, Docker cleanup, production seed, destructive cleanup, database reset, or production write-path e2e without human approval.

tasks.title: Production deployment preflight and release gate evidence table
acceptance: Creates a production preflight evidence table covering release commit, clean worktree, CI references, engineering gates, target environment owner, approval state, and Go / Conditional-Go / No-Go inputs.
Maps each preflight item to source evidence, command shape, approval requirement, pass/fail/blocked status, and required owner.
Records that production deploy, migration, seed, bootstrap, backup, rollback, Docker cleanup, and production data operations are not executed by default.
Identifies any missing evidence as No-Go or Conditional-Go with owner and next action.
Does not modify business code, migration, seed, auth, CI, Docker, deploy, infra, or production env files.

tasks.title: Migration seed init baseline and bootstrap-admin evidence flow
acceptance: Defines an auditable release-chain flow for pnpm db:migrate, ALLOW_PRODUCTION_SEED=yes pnpm db:seed:prod, first db:check:init, db:bootstrap:admin, and second db:check:init.
Records command preconditions, required approvals, target-environment evidence fields, failure-stop behavior, and rollback/backup dependencies.
Separates production seed from dev seed and explicitly documents that no seed or migration is executed in this task without approval.
Includes a No-Go rule for migration failure, checksum/history conflict, seed failure, bootstrap-admin failure, or baseline failure.
Does not modify migrations, seeds, database schema, deploy scripts, production env, or business code.

tasks.title: Database backup file backup rollback tag and Docker cleanup evidence closure
acceptance: Creates evidence requirements for PostgreSQL backup, file storage backup, previous API/Web image tags, release image tags, rollback owner, observation window, rollback triggers, and Docker cleanup result.
Defines what evidence proves backup readability and rollback readiness without storing secrets or production paths that expose credentials.
Records Docker cleanup as a post-health-check gate and requires explicit skip/failure reasons if cleanup cannot run.
Marks missing backup, rollback tag, rollback owner, or Docker cleanup evidence as No-Go.
Does not run backup, restore, rollback, Docker cleanup, deploy, migration, seed, or production data operations.

tasks.title: Production health container login and file smoke dry-run plan
acceptance: Defines dry-run and controlled-execution plans for MODE=full pnpm prod:health, bash scripts/verify-api-login-dockerexec.sh, and node scripts/e2e/first-release-files.mjs.
Documents required target, credentials, TEST_RUN_ID, cleanup plan, file storage root, and approval conditions before any production-like execution.
Separates read-only health/login checks from file upload/download/delete smoke and marks write-path smoke as approval-gated.
Records expected evidence for upload, download, delete, deleted-file rejection, and file backup linkage.
Does not run production health, container login verification, or file smoke against a real target in this task without approval.

tasks.title: IoT safety runtime smoke and production-safe inspection plan
acceptance: Creates a production-safe IoT and safety release smoke plan covering safety access, S5A/S5B, S9A-S9F1, unified action executor, alert visibility, automatic hazard visibility, duplicate prevention, and energy reversal.
Classifies each command as local/pre-production full execution, production read-only sampling, or production write-path requiring approval.
Defines required test data marker, cleanup expectations, and evidence fields for any approved write-path smoke.
Records No-Go rules for automatic hazard invisibility, duplicate linked actions, safety access failure, or energy reversal failure.
Does not modify business code, migrations, seeds, auth, CI, Docker, deploy, or production env files.

tasks.title: RBAC menu dashboard and permission visibility release check plan
acceptance: Creates RBAC, menu, dashboard, and permission visibility release checks for pre-production execution and production read-only sampling.
Maps super-admin, standard role, denied route, first-release menu whitelist, dashboard visibility, and permission consistency evidence to Go / No-Go criteria.
Documents required accounts, target URLs, screenshots or command logs, and human approvals for production sampling.
Records No-Go rules for unauthorized access, missing first-release menu, non-first-release menu exposure, or dashboard permission mismatch.
Does not modify apps/api, apps/web, packages, migrations, seeds, auth, CI, Docker, deploy, or production env files.

tasks.title: Contract finance receivable payment invoice and audit release check plan
acceptance: Creates a finance release check plan for contracts, receivables, payments, invoices, waivers, financial summaries, idempotency, delete/void protections, and audit-log sampling.
Classifies checks as local/pre-production full execution, production read-only sampling, or production write-path requiring approval.
Documents required test data marker, cleanup expectations, audit evidence fields, and finance owner sign-off.
Records No-Go rules for duplicate receivable/payment, unsafe financial delete, missing audit log, invoice/waiver failure, or idempotency conflict behavior failure.
Does not modify financial service code, DTOs, entities, migrations, seeds, auth, CI, Docker, deploy, or production env files.

tasks.title: Orchestrator release-gate automation design and dry-run integration
acceptance: Designs or implements orchestrator-only dry-run release-gate automation that aggregates queue status, audit results, validation matrix, and production evidence checklist into a single report.
Ensures dry-run mode does not mutate task-queue.json, task-locks.json, task-results.json, business code, production config, or target environments.
Documents how future approved execution can attach production evidence without committing secrets.
Keeps merge, push, deploy, production data operations, migration, seed, backup, restore, rollback, and Docker cleanup behind human confirmation.
Does not modify business code, migrations, seeds, auth, CI, Docker, deploy, infra, or production env files.
